edition: Parasanātha Dvivedī (ed.), *Vivaraṇa-Prameya-Saṅgraha of Vidyāraṇya-Muni*, Sampūrṇānanda Saṃskṛta Viśvavidyālaya, Varanasi, 2005 (Sanskrit + Hindi)
commentaries_included: Hindi anvaya and translation by Parasanātha Dvivedī

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Eight sections (varṇakas) of Vidyāraṇya's Vivaraṇa-summary, with the 2005 critical edition running 946 pages including Hindi

ground_truth_source: Existing 1893 Vizianagaram PDF on corpus disk is a comparator but is the *degraded* version this acquisition is meant to *replace* (see ACQUISITION_PATHWAYS §C.1).
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~533): high-DPI scan. Producer 'BookChanger 4.6.3'. 946 pages. 2005 typesetting is born-digital quality.
ocr_friendliness_notes: 2005 critical edition with modern typesetting — by far the most OCR-friendly Sanskrit/Hindi pair in the priority-12. Hindi anvaya rows require script-region segmentation but are likely well-separated from the Sanskrit mūla.
ia_filename: Vivarana Prameya Sangraha By Vidyaranya Muni Edited By Parasa Nath Dvivedi 2005 Benaras - Sampurna Ananda Sanskrit University.pdf
